items.title: AI-accelerated End-to-End Framework for Rapid Professional Upskilling
items.summary: By 2030, 59 of every 100 workers will need reskilling or upskilling, yet the average time to close an enterprise skills gap grew from roughly 3 days in 2014 to 36 days in 2018. items.title: Transforming Rank: How Architecture Navigates the Spectral Pathologies of Depth

items.title: Rethinking Penetration Testing for AI-Enabled Systems: From Resource Compromise to Behavioral Objective Violation

items.title: Do Agent Optimizers Compound? A Continual-Learning Evaluation on Terminal-Bench 2.0

items.title: A Self-Evolving Agent for Longitudinal Personal Health Management
items.summary: Personal health management unfolds over repeated encounters, yet most health AI systems treat each request in isolation. items.title: Generative Compilation: On-the-Fly Compiler Feedback as AI Generates Code

items.title: Partially Correlated Verifier Cascades in LLM Harnesses: Concave Log-Odds, Polynomial Reliability, and Blind-Spot Ceilings
items.summary: Serial verification gates are a core reliability primitive in LLM harnesses: a candidate answer is returned only if $k$ verifier calls all accept it. items.title: AIMO Interpretability Challenge

items.title: Experience Memory Graph: One-Shot Error Correction for Agents

items.title: Verifying formulas for interventional distributions
items.summary: We formalize verification in causal graphical models: deciding whether a given observational formula identifies a target interventional distribution. This opens a problem complementary to identification, asking not whether any identifying formula exists, but whether the given formula is identifying.

items.title: Unleashing Multimodal Large Language Models for Training-free HOI Detection in the Wild

items.title: AI-Augmented Human Resource Management? Insights from German companies
items.summary: This study examines the integration of AI into Human Resource Management in German companies. items.title: NodeImport: Imbalanced Node Classification with Node Importance Assessment

items.title: Linear Independent Component Analysis via Optimal Transport

items.title: Screening of Biosecurity Features in Metagenomic Data with Evo 2 Probes
items.summary: Genomic foundation models such as Evo 2 learn rich sequence representations, but their value for biosecurity screening is largely unexplored. items.title: Lighthouse RL: Sample-Efficient Circuit Optimization via Strategic Reset Points
